parsed_output.justification: Justin makes several contradictory claims about his role, first claiming to be the Seer who looked at the center cards, and later claiming to be the Robber who switched cards with Dan. Furthermore, Mitchell baits Justin by claiming to be the Tanner, and Justin's reaction suggests he is lying about his identity to avoid suspicion. This pattern of inconsistent bluffing is highly characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to divert suspicion.
